description: A manager needs to correct an employee's timesheet from last week before the payroll deadline.

nodes.task_description: Access the time and attendance system as a manager.
Select the employee and the pay period that needs correction.

expected_outcome.expected: Manager navigates to the correct employee timesheet.

nodes.task_description: Update the incorrect time entry and re-approve the timesheet.

expected_outcome.expected: Manager corrects the hours and submits the timesheet for payroll processing.
